JUDICIAL  NOTIFICATIONS
Destruction of Records in Criminal Miscellaneous Petitions Disposed by the
Principal City Civil and Sessions Court, Chennai.
(Dis. No. 3621/I2/Records/Sessions)
No. VI(1)/138/2012.
Notice is hereby given that the parties concerned should apply to the  Hon'ble Principal Sessions, City Civil Court,
Chennai-600 104 for return of documents, if any filed by them in the Criminal Miscellaneous Petitions relating to the years
noted below within one month from the date of publication of this notification, failing which the documents will be destroyed
along with the records under the rules relating to the Destruction or Records.
Criminal Miscellaneous Petitions
Year 2005 Entire records and documents filed in Criminal Miscellaneous Petitions up to the year ending i.e. December
31st 2005 and disposed off up to the year ending i.e. December 2005 as per the list mentioned below:

List of Part-I Records to be Destroyed Record Destruction Register of Original Suits for the Year-1989 in the
City Civil Court, Chennai-104.
DESTRUCTION OF RECORDS IN THE OFFICE OF THE CITY CIIL COURT CHENNAI.
(Dis No. 3622/2012/R.K.I)
No. VI(1)/139/2012
It is hereby notified for the information of parties and witnesses that under the rule for the destruction of Part-I &Part
-III records framed by High Court of judicature at Madras under V of 1917, printed at pages 311 to 317 of the volume I of
the Civil Rules of Practice and circular orders, all documents produced by them and filed as exhibits in the original suits
and connected appeals, original petitions and Applications in the City Civil Court at Chennai mentioned in the schedule
hereto and all other documents which have been tendered but either have not been taken or rejected in the Original Suits.
Applications and Original Petitions mentioned in the said schedule be destroyed after thirty days from the date of publication.
